h1.visual_description: Large, bold, serif font. Typically spans two lines: 'Chapter [Number]' followed by the chapter title in a larger font size.

h2.visual_description: Bold, serif font, smaller than h1. Prefixed with a hierarchical section number (e.g., 3.1, 3.2).

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Introduction of key technical terms or definitions (e.g., 'numerical derivatives', 'truncation error').
Internal cross-reference to other parts of the document.

visual_matchers.pattern: Centered block equations with variables in italics

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX (use $...$ for inline and $$...$$ for display blocks)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Standard academic margins; no headers or footers visible on this specific page, but likely contains page numbers in a full view.
